title: Hypothesis Testing Flowchart
description: A step-by-step visual guide to the process of statistical hypothesis testing, from stating the hypotheses to making a conclusion.
elements: Collect Sample Data & Calculate Test Statistic
Make Decision: Reject H₀ or Fail to Reject H₀
relationships: Sequential flow from one step to the next, with a decision point branching based on the comparison of the P-value to α or the test statistic to the critical value
